description_long: This is a thick, rectangular book with a predominantly light gray cover and a horizontal yellow-orange block near the top, which contains the main title text. The book appears to be a softcover or possibly a matte-finished hardcover, with clean, sharp edges and a visible layered texture along the page block. The front cover is minimalistic, featuring only text and no visible illustration or artwork. The spine is also light gray, with subtle text and a small logo, and the publisher's branding is present on both the cover and spine. The book's overall appearance is professional and academic, suggesting it is a reference or technical volume. The object is solid and compact, suitable for carrying or stacking with other books.
description: A thick, light gray book with a yellow-orange title block and minimalistic, professional design. The cover is plain with only text and no illustration.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the layered texture of the pages and the clean, flat cover with the yellow-orange title block visible.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the front, displaying the full cover with the yellow-orange block and the main title text, as well as the publisher's logo in the lower right.
description_view_2: The book is seen from the opposite side, again highlighting the page block and the plain, light gray cover with the yellow-orange block partially visible.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the back, showing the plain cover with minimal text and no illustration, and the spine with subtle text and logo.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is light gray with subtle horizontal text and a small logo near the bottom. The design is minimalistic and professional, with no decorative elements.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small circular logo with a dot and arc, located on the lower right of the front cover and near the bottom of the spine.
